title: Faithful: PAEBlackHole param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 10.4 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAEBlackHole must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAEBlackHole to range extremes across hosts ['Movements__Black_Hole'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=10.39 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAEBlackHole implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAEBlackHole` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts. Worst diverging (host/param/theta -> ddb): [{"host": "Movements__Black_Hole", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.5, "oracle_signal": 77.126, "ddb": 10.387}, {"host": "Movements__Black_Hole", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 61.386, "ddb": 12.369}, {"host": "Movements__Black_Hole", "param": "center/y", "theta": 1.0586, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 40.289, "ddb": 14.382}, {"host": "Movements__Black_Hole", "param": "center/y", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 39.877, "ddb": 14.445}, {"host": "Movements__Black_Hole", "param": "center/y", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 52.558, "ddb": 14.824}, {"host": "Movements__Black_Hole", "param": "center/y", "theta": 1.0586, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 49.579, "ddb": 14.888}]
